item.title: Checking Trailer Brakes Before Hauling
item.description: Larson checks trailer brakes before hauling equipment, keeping field work moving safely and avoiding delays on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Checking Trailer Brakes Before Hauling
media:content.media:description: Larson checks trailer brakes before hauling equipment, keeping field work moving safely and avoiding delays on the farm.

item.title: Car Testing in the Snow
item.description: Larson puts a car to the test in snowy conditions, showing winter farm ground and the kind of practical work that comes with rural weather.

media:content.media:title: Car Testing in the Snow
media:content.media:description: Larson puts a car to the test in snowy conditions, showing winter farm ground and the kind of practical work that comes with rural weather.

item.title: Checking Equipment After a Rough Farm Job
item.description: Larson handles a tough workday and checks equipment after the job. A practical look at farm work, safety, and keeping things running.

media:content.media:title: Checking Equipment After a Rough Farm Job
media:content.media:description: Larson handles a tough workday and checks equipment after the job. A practical look at farm work, safety, and keeping things running.

item.title: New and Shiny on the Farm
item.description: Larson shows a new, shiny piece of equipment ready for work. A simple look at fresh machinery in the yard and the daily routine around it.

media:content.media:title: New and Shiny on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Larson shows a new, shiny piece of equipment ready for work. A simple look at fresh machinery in the yard and the daily routine around it.

item.title: Combines and Digging Shanks in the Field
item.description: Farm equipment works across fields with combines and digging shanks performing harvesting and soil preparation during field operations.

media:content.media:title: Combines and Digging Shanks in the Field
media:content.media:description: Farm equipment works across fields with combines and digging shanks performing harvesting and soil preparation during field operations.

item.title: Working Through the Heat on the Farm
item.description: Farm crews continue fieldwork and equipment operation during hot conditions, focusing on steady progress and crop management.

media:content.media:title: Working Through the Heat on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Farm crews continue fieldwork and equipment operation during hot conditions, focusing on steady progress and crop management.

item.title: Highlights From a Farm Auction Sale
item.description: A farm auction features equipment, machinery, and tools as buyers bid on items during a busy rural sale event.

media:content.media:title: Highlights From a Farm Auction Sale
media:content.media:description: A farm auction features equipment, machinery, and tools as buyers bid on items during a busy rural sale event.

item.title: Truck Gets Stuck in the Field
item.description: A farm vehicle becomes stuck during fieldwork, requiring recovery efforts and equipment to get it moving again.

media:content.media:title: Truck Gets Stuck in the Field
media:content.media:description: A farm vehicle becomes stuck during fieldwork, requiring recovery efforts and equipment to get it moving again.

item.title: Checking a Low Field Setup
item.description: Farm equipment is inspected during a low setup in the field, ensuring proper alignment and safe operation before continuing work.

media:content.media:title: Checking a Low Field Setup
media:content.media:description: Farm equipment is inspected during a low setup in the field, ensuring proper alignment and safe operation before continuing work.

item.title: Large Farm Equipment in the Field
item.description: Big farm machines are assembled and used in field operations, showing large-scale equipment working together during crop production.

media:content.media:title: Large Farm Equipment in the Field
media:content.media:description: Big farm machines are assembled and used in field operations, showing large-scale equipment working together during crop production.

item.title: New Farm Equipment Investment Arrives
item.description: A new piece of farm equipment arrives and is inspected as part of ongoing upgrades to improve efficiency in field operations.

media:content.media:title: New Farm Equipment Investment Arrives
media:content.media:description: A new piece of farm equipment arrives and is inspected as part of ongoing upgrades to improve efficiency in field operations.

item.title: Sometimes Farming Requires a Careful Guess
item.description: Farm decisions are made in changing field conditions, requiring judgment and experience to guide planting, harvesting, and equipment use.

media:content.media:title: Sometimes Farming Requires a Careful Guess
media:content.media:description: Farm decisions are made in changing field conditions, requiring judgment and experience to guide planting, harvesting, and equipment use.
